name: Pleated Blinds
shortDescription: A compact, elegant pleated system for small, medium, and non-standard windows.
fullDescription: Pleated blinds are ideal when you want a light look, clean lines, and a precise fit. They work well in homes, offices, and commercial spaces where light control, a minimalist aesthetic, and a solution tailored to each window shape matter. Winsome manufactures pleated blinds to custom measurements so every opening gets a properly fitted, practical solution.
features: Made to fit non-standard and narrow windows
benefits: Does not visually clutter the room
Easily manages light and privacy
Suits compact spaces well
Convenient for everyday use

seoTitle: Pleated Blinds in Tbilisi and Georgia
seoDescription: Custom-made pleated blinds in Tbilisi. Ideal for modern interiors, small and non-standard windows, with precise professional installation.

faqs.question: Are pleated blinds suitable for small windows?
faqs.answer: Yes. Pleated systems are especially practical for small, narrow, and non-standard windows, including skylights or triangular openings. The compact folding mechanism does not take up extra space and keeps small rooms from feeling heavy. Winsome produces pleated blinds to custom measurements, so even unusual windows can be covered cleanly and functionally.

faqs.question: Can pleated blinds be made to custom measurements?
faqs.answer: Yes. Winsome manufactures every order based on accurate on-site measuring—each window is measured individually rather than using stock sizes. Measuring service is available in Tbilisi and major cities across Georgia. Production begins after measurement and is typically completed within several working days. You receive blinds cut to your exact opening for smooth operation and a neat finish.

name: Roller Blinds
shortDescription: A minimalist roller system that suits apartments, offices, and contemporary interiors.
fullDescription: Roller blinds are among the most popular choices for modern spaces. The system takes little room, looks clean, and fits both residential and commercial interiors. Winsome manufactures roller blinds to custom sizes with a range of fabric options so you get light and privacy control tailored to how you use the room.
features: Choice of light-filtering and blackout fabrics
benefits: Contemporary look in any interior
Easy to integrate in homes and offices
Controls light and privacy
Straightforward to clean and maintain

seoTitle: Roller Blinds in Tbilisi and Georgia
seoDescription: Roller blinds in Tbilisi. Custom sizing, quality fabrics, neat installation, and solutions matched to modern interiors.

faqs.question: Are roller blinds a good choice for bedrooms?
faqs.answer: Yes. Roller blinds are one of the most popular options for bedrooms. Depending on your needs you can choose light-filtering (dimout) or full blackout fabric. Blackout is especially useful when the window faces a street or when you need complete darkness for children’s rooms or shift workers. During consultation we help you pick the right opacity and colour for sleep quality and daytime comfort.

faqs.question: Do you offer a wide range of colours and fabrics?
faqs.answer: Yes. Winsome’s roller blind catalogue includes more than 70 colours and fabric options—neutral, pastel, and bolder tones. Various textures are available, including smooth, linen-effect, and other finishes. At consultation you can review samples and choose a combination that harmonises with your furniture and wall colours. This makes it easier to match new blinds to an existing renovation or a full redesign.

name: Zebra Blinds
shortDescription: Zebra (day-and-night) blinds for flexible control of light and privacy.
fullDescription: Zebra blinds—often called day-night blinds—are ideal if you want both soft light filtering and privacy in one system. Two layers of moving fabric let you change the mood of a room easily during the day. Winsome offers zebra blinds for customers who want a modern, distinctive, practical solution for homes, offices, and commercial spaces.
features: Custom sizes for all window types
benefits: Adjust light without fully raising the blind
Decorative, contemporary appearance
Suits living and work environments
Pairs well with neutral interiors

seoTitle: Zebra Blinds in Tbilisi and Georgia
seoDescription: Zebra and day-night blinds in Tbilisi and Georgia. Dual-layer fabric, custom sizes, contemporary design, and quality installation.

faqs.question: Are zebra blinds practical for offices?
faqs.answer: Yes. Zebra (day-night) blinds are very practical in office settings. The dual-layer fabric lets you regulate daylight without fully raising the blind, which helps reduce glare on screens and monitors. The contemporary look fits open-plan offices as well as private meeting rooms. Operation is quick for staff who open and close blinds often during the day. Colour and fabric choice can align with corporate interiors or residential-style studio spaces.

faqs.question: What is the difference between zebra blinds and day-night blinds?
faqs.answer: They are the same product category: alternating sheer and opaque stripes on two layers that slide past each other. “Zebra” refers to the striped look; “day-night” describes how you can switch between softer daylight and stronger privacy in one headrail. At Winsome we size the system to your reveal depth and help you pick stripe scale and fabric opacity for living rooms, kitchens, or bedrooms. Installation is planned so the chain or wand clears handles and sill projections. That way you get smooth operation and a clean stack whether the blind is fully lowered or partially open.

name: Roman Blinds
shortDescription: Soft, fabric-forward Roman blinds for residential and hospitality spaces.
fullDescription: Roman blinds suit anyone who wants a warmer, textile-based, decorative window treatment. The elegant stacked fold adds calm and visual depth to a room. Winsome offers this category for bedrooms, living rooms, hotels, and other spaces where design and everyday practicality matter equally.
benefits: Adds warmth and calm to interiors
Especially suited to bedrooms and lounges
More decorative than a standard roller blind
Coordinates well with curtains and other textiles

seoTitle: Roman Blinds in Tbilisi and Georgia
seoDescription: Roman blinds for homes and hospitality. Premium fabrics, custom fabrication, and precise installation in Tbilisi.

faqs.question: Are Roman blinds a good choice for bedrooms?
faqs.answer: Yes. Roman blinds are an excellent bedroom option when you want a soft, textile-rich, cosy look. Unlike curtains alone, they fold up compactly and do not consume unnecessary wall or stack space. Both translucent and blackout fabrics are available depending on how much morning light you want. The structured fold also gives a tailored, finished appearance that works in both classic and modern bedrooms.

faqs.question: Can Roman blinds be made with blackout fabric?
faqs.answer: Yes. Roman blinds are available with both light-filtering and full blackout fabrics. Blackout is especially useful for bedrooms and children’s rooms where complete darkness improves sleep. Fabric type is chosen during consultation based on orientation, street lighting, and your preferences. Winsome helps you balance aesthetics with the level of shading you need year-round.

name: Faux Wood Blinds
shortDescription: Wide-slat blinds with a wood-grain look for a warmer, more defined interior character.
fullDescription: Faux wood blinds are designed for those who like horizontal slats but want a warmer, wood-effect, decorative appearance. They are often used in living rooms, studies, and classic or contemporary interiors where both light control and visual character matter. Winsome offers this range in custom sizes with several colour directions to match trim and furniture.
features: Fabrication to your exact window size
benefits: Adds a warm, natural feel to the room
Decorative yet practical
Suited to studies and living rooms
Easy light control by tilting the slats

seoTitle: Faux Wood Blinds in Tbilisi and Georgia
seoDescription: Faux wood blinds for wood-effect interiors. Custom sizes, horizontal slats, and professional installation in Tbilisi and Georgia.

faqs.question: Are faux wood blinds an alternative to real wood blinds?
faqs.answer: Yes. Faux wood blinds deliver a warm look close to natural timber while staying practical and cost-effective. Compared with solid wood, they are typically lighter, need less specialised maintenance, and cope better with humidity in kitchens or bathrooms when specified appropriately. They suit homeowners who love wood aesthetics but prioritise durability and easy cleaning. Winsome can advise on room suitability during measuring.

faqs.question: Can faux wood blinds be used in offices?
faqs.answer: Yes. Faux wood blinds look especially strong in studies, meeting rooms, and representative spaces. Wide slats create a solid, finished impression while tilt adjustment gives precise control over glare and privacy. Offices often choose neutral slat colours that blend with joinery and flooring. Installation is planned around reveal depth and handle clearance so daily operation stays smooth for staff and visitors.

name: Vertical Blinds
shortDescription: A practical vertical system for wide and tall glazing.
fullDescription: Vertical blinds are especially effective on large windows, in offices, schools, and commercial spaces where you need to manage sun angle and glare. Vertical louvres create an orderly, functional look. Winsome supplies this system for projects that require simple operation, accurate sizing, and durable daily use.
features: Suitable for large and tall windows
Practical for office and commercial spaces
benefits: Helps control direct sunlight
Suits wide glazing and office layouts
Maintains a neat, structured appearance
Easy to draw and tilt throughout the day

seoTitle: Vertical Blinds in Tbilisi and Georgia
seoDescription: Vertical blinds for offices, curtain walls, and commercial spaces. Custom sizes, robust hardware, and precise installation.

faqs.question: Are vertical blinds only for offices?
faqs.answer: No. While vertical blinds are traditionally popular in offices, they also work well on large home windows, balcony doors, and studio-style layouts. Vertical vanes make it easier to manage light across a wide opening where horizontal systems can be less practical. Fabric and colour choice can be adapted to residential décors as well as corporate palettes. Winsome assesses stack direction and obstructions during the site visit.

faqs.question: Can a damaged slat be replaced individually?
faqs.answer: Yes. One advantage of vertical blinds is that a single damaged vane can often be replaced without replacing the entire system. This saves cost and downtime when one louvre is stained or bent. Winsome can supply a matching replacement vane sized and coloured to your existing track. We recommend keeping a note of fabric batch where possible for the closest colour match over time.

name: Horizontal Blinds
shortDescription: Classic horizontal blinds with precise control, easy care, and broad applications.
fullDescription: Horizontal blinds remain one of the most practical choices when you need precise control of light direction and low-maintenance surfaces. They work well in kitchens, offices, areas near wet zones, and home offices. Winsome supplies horizontal blinds with accurate measuring, several colour options, and robust construction for everyday use.
benefits: Manages daylight effectively
Suits kitchens and work areas
No complicated maintenance routine
Fits both classic and modern interiors

seoTitle: Horizontal Blinds in Tbilisi and Georgia
seoDescription: Horizontal blinds for kitchens, offices, and daily use. Precise control, durable slats, and installation in Tbilisi.

faqs.question: Are horizontal blinds practical for kitchens?
faqs.answer: Yes. Horizontal blinds are a very practical kitchen choice. Slats can be wiped with a damp cloth, and aluminium or PVC finishes tolerate steam and splashes better than absorbent textiles. Tilting the slats gives fine control over daylight so food prep areas stay comfortably lit without harsh glare. Winsome helps you choose slat width and colour that resist fingerprints and coordinate with cabinets and splashbacks.

faqs.question: Can I choose a moisture-resistant option?
faqs.answer: Yes. Horizontal blinds are available in moisture-resistant aluminium and PVC materials that perform well in kitchens, bathrooms, and other humid areas. During consultation we match slat finish and headrail size to your reveal depth and opening frequency. The right specification extends service life in steamy environments and keeps operation smooth after years of daily use.

name: Pleated Insect Screen
shortDescription: A pleated mesh system for doors and windows where you want airflow and insect protection.
fullDescription: Pleated insect screens are especially convenient for balcony doors, terraces, and busy exits. The folding side-sliding system saves space and suits modern door profiles. Winsome offers this category for customers who want comfort, neat installation, and reliable insect protection for everyday living.
features: Suitable for balcony doors and terraces
Folds compactly when not in use
benefits: Keeps insects out while allowing air movement
Convenient on frequently used doors
Space-efficient when open
Works with modern aluminium and uPVC systems

seoTitle: Pleated Insect Screen in Tbilisi and Georgia
seoDescription: Pleated insect screens for balcony doors, terraces, and exits. Custom sizes and professional installation in Tbilisi.

faqs.question: Is a pleated screen suitable for a balcony door?
faqs.answer: Yes. Pleated screens are among the most practical solutions for balcony and terrace doors where people pass through often. The mesh slides sideways and stacks to one side so it does not block the opening when the door is open. The barrier still keeps flies and mosquitoes out while fresh air circulates. Installation is fitted to the door frame without major structural changes in most cases. Winsome measures to ensure smooth travel along the full width.

faqs.question: Does the pleated screen fold to the side?
faqs.answer: Yes. Side-stacking folding is a key benefit of this system. The mesh gathers compactly at one end and stays out of the way when you need full passage—ideal for busy doorways where a fixed framed screen would be awkward. That makes daily use simpler for families and in commercial entries with frequent traffic. Track and brush seals are adjusted for even closure across the opening.

name: Hinged Insect Screen
shortDescription: Hinged insect screens for doors and windows where quick open-and-close access matters.
fullDescription: Hinged insect screens are a practical choice when you need a simple, fast, reliable opening system. They are especially convenient on garden doors, kitchen doors, and windows that open and close frequently. Winsome manufactures hinged screens to size and frame colour so the system integrates cleanly with your existing joinery.
features: Suitable for doors and busy windows
Fabrication matched to size and profile
benefits: Daily insect protection with minimal fuss
Simple for family and commercial use
Durable under frequent opening cycles
Well suited to garden and kitchen doors

seoTitle: Hinged Insect Screen in Tbilisi and Georgia
seoDescription: Hinged insect screens for doors and windows. Practical operation, custom sizes, and installation in Tbilisi.

faqs.question: Can hinged insect screens be used on doors?
faqs.answer: Yes. Hinged screens are especially practical on doors with heavy foot traffic. The panel can close magnetically or on hinges and opens easily with one hand when you carry shopping or trays. They work on main entrances as well as balcony openings where you want ventilation without a full barrier in the way. Frame depth and swing direction are checked at survey so handles and locks remain usable.

faqs.question: Can I choose the frame colour?
faqs.answer: Yes. Aluminium frame colours can be selected to match your existing door or window profiles. Standard options include white, brown, anthracite, and other common tones. A coordinated finish helps the screen blend with interior trim or exterior façade. Winsome confirms colour samples against your joinery where possible so the installed screen looks intentional rather than added as an afterthought.
